overall.description: A cinematic view of a gothic great hall interior from a video game, featuring a massive dragon skeleton suspended from the vaulted ceiling. Students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables while natural light streams through tall arched windows, creating a warm, atmospheric ambiance reminiscent of Hogwarts.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with suspended dragon skeleton

agents.ego_description: standing still in the great hall, observing the interior architecture and other occupants seated at the tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at wooden table facing away from camera
student sitting at table with back to camera, wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: massive skeletal remains of a dragon suspended from the vaulted ceiling by chains
tall narrow stained glass windows with pointed arches allowing natural light to enter
long rectangular wooden tables with benches arranged in rows
high ribbed stone ceiling with gothic arch architecture
circular iron chandelier with multiple candle holders hanging from ceiling
grey stone block walls with gothic architectural details and banners

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary within a grand gothic great hall, showcasing a massive dragon skeleton suspended from the high vaulted ceiling. Natural light filters through tall arched windows on the left, illuminating students seated at long wooden tables below. The warm stone interior and dramatic architecture create an atmospheric, cinematic environment typical of a fantasy game setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary, cinematic gaze into a grand gothic great hall that emphasizes the scale of its dramatic architecture. It begins by capturing the vastness of the space, where a massive dragon skeleton hangs suspended from the high vaulted ceiling. As the eye settles, natural light filters through tall arched windows on the left, casting a soft glow over students seated at long wooden tables below. The scene concludes by lingering on the warm stone interior, blending the imposing skeletal remains with the quiet academic atmosphere of the fantasy setting.
